title: santolina magonica
intro: Santolina magonica, also known as Large Gray Wormwood or Big Gray Wormwood, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel insects and its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Santolina magonica include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Santolina magonica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
